title: Height Chart Leak Whoops
wikitext:
[]: Height Chart Leak (Whoops...)             Quote Post by Joseki » Fri Feb 22, 2019 2:30 am [TWEET DELETED BY KHARA] The second page is somewhat visible and it reads "characters & [word I don't know]", people on Twitter saw Toji and Kensuke in the bottom left corner. EDIT: see the following post

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by Zeruss » Fri Feb 22, 2019 4:10 am For anyone interested, here's an edit of the first photo that is a bit clearer on the names and most of the heights... Though the five names on the right side are almost illegible (as is the annotation below Kensuke's height). SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by Joseki » Fri Feb 22, 2019 7:34 am They removed the Tweet

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by robersora » Fri Feb 22, 2019 7:36 am ^ obtuse teaser or genuine slip up in their tight-lipped marketing? Either way, I'm conflicted! tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) Seems like whoever runs the account srsly fucked up, lol. tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Feb 22, 2019 8:56 am So ..... SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Fri Feb 22, 2019 9:06 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: So ..... SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Feb 22, 2019 9:11 am I never believed that Tōji had died. I hope this really is confirmation that I was right. Maybe Anno took some inspiration from my story (and if you believe that, you'll believe anything...)!

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Feb 22, 2019 9:24 am Anyone think they’re going to a major info release on April 1st? Isn’t that the start of the new financial year or something vitally important in Japan? Kindve like how April 1, 2015 they released the news Anno was doing Godzilla.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Feb 22, 2019 11:24 am New tweet tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Fri Feb 22, 2019 11:52 am Zeruss wrote: For anyone interested, here's an edit of the first photo that is a bit clearer on the names and most of the heights... Though the five names on the right side are almost illegible (as is the annotation below Kensuke's height). SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Feb 22, 2019 12:18 pm I guess that retweeting the image in a more obscured form is proof we weren't meant to be able to read it...

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by The Cruel » Fri Feb 22, 2019 12:23 pm Zeruss wrote: For anyone interested, here's an edit of the first photo that is a bit clearer on the names and most of the heights... Though the five names on the right side are almost illegible (as is the annotation below Kensuke's height). SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Fri Feb 22, 2019 12:29 pm pwhodges wrote: I guess that retweeting the image in a more obscured form is proof we weren't meant to be able to read it...

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Feb 22, 2019 1:45 pm Their apology tweets + deleting the original picture means it was a screw-up on their part, yes. (ミス = Mistake.) I'm super happy for this news, though, and hope it's not some flashback or metaphysical Instrumentality sequence. Shin Evangelion Gunbuster is real

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Feb 22, 2019 1:59 pm WHOOPS!!!! I figured it was a mistake like that From Khara. That doesn’t appear like anything they would want to leak prior to the release date. It seems a whole lot like Eva Q levels of spoilers. Happy about the news nonetheless, but WHERE’S MY Kaji????

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Feb 22, 2019 2:40 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Shin Evangelion Gunbuster is real

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Feb 22, 2019 3:38 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Their apology tweets + deleting the original picture means it was a screw-up on their part, yes. (ミス = Mistake.)

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Feb 22, 2019 4:42 pm This little thing made me nervous as fuck. I'm gonna explode when the trailer drops.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by Joseki » Fri Feb 22, 2019 4:54 pm The Gunbuster comparison is really spot on. The 3.0 cast is Noriko and we all are Kimiko.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Feb 22, 2019 4:54 pm ∆ lol
